fmanBasic Given a probability distribution and the corresponding alphabet, decode the input using Huffman code and send the result to the output port. Its base class HuffmanBasic generates the code book. The decoder simply decode the input a

ode book. The decoder simply decode the input according to this code book. Since: Ptolemy II 4.1 Version: $Id: HuffmanDecoder.java,v 1.12 2005/04/25 21:23:44 cxh Exp $ Author: Ye Zhou See Also: HuffmanBasic , HuffmanCoder , Serialized Form Accepte
